svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 22px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #24415A;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#24415A, #a4bdd2); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 59px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #6B7B8C;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#6B7B8C, #798795); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;
